title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions:
Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha & Co Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
